title: Quick Log
subtitle: Tap to capture block times live — the flight log is created when you go on blocks
quickAddTitle: Add a new aircraft to your fleet
discardDescription: The recorded times will be deleted and no flight will be logged.
flightLoggedHint: Block times, total time, and route were filled in automatically. Review the entry to add landings details, crew, and remarks.
queuedTaps_one: {{count}} tap saved offline — will sync when you're back online
queuedTaps_other: {{count}} taps saved offline — will sync when you're back online
gpsHint: With location access, departure and arrival airports are filled in automatically.
genericError: Could not record the event. Please try again.
